temples.name: Jagannath Temple, Bodh Gaya
temples.description: A Jagannath shrine near the Mahabodhi Temple complex in Bodh Gaya.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Mahabodhi Temple
temples.description: A UNESCO World Heritage Buddhist temple marking the place where Gautama Buddha attained enlightenment.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Vishnupad Temple
temples.description: A major Vishnu shrine at Gaya, known for the sacred footprint of Lord Vishnu and Pind Daan rituals.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Mundeshwari Devi Temple
temples.description: An ancient functional temple on Mundeshwari Hill dedicated to Shakti and Shiva.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Takhat Sri Harimandir Ji Patna Sahib
temples.description: One of the five Sikh takhts, revered as the birthplace of Guru Gobind Singh Ji.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.
